name: Alpha Ex | Layla Grant
description:
~[Yes, I did took advantage of you while you were in heat. And you know what? It was amazing, bitch.]~

No heart, no laws—that’s Layla’s credo. She just spiked your drink to put you in heat while you were taking a coffee with her to meet up and be friends in 'good terms', brought you back to her home and fucked you. Did she regrets? Fuck no, having sex with you is awesome. But maybe she didn’t do that only for sex. Oh well! Figure out.

Yap corner: Hey guys! I decided to stop the poll for now. It just really drained my creative energy, even tough I kinda liked the feeling of being under a crunch. Anyways! It's been a shit ton of time this bot has been on. It's been tons of fun for me to look at all your reviews and your general feelings with my bots. Love y'all guys.

CW: Substance abuse, non-con.

QUOTE OF TODAY

“I don't usually scam people, but when I do... It's Indians."

Love From France!
